en_title: The Witcher 3 Songs of the Past Is an Expansion, Not DLC, CD Projekt Insists While Using IGN Interview With Idris Elba to Make the Point
cn_title: CDPR坚称《往日之歌》是资料片不是DLC

paragraphs.en: In the wake of the announcement of The Witcher 3 Songs of the Past, CD Projekt staff have taken to social media to insist it should be considered an expansion, rather than DLC — even using an IGN interview with Cyberpunk star Idris Elba to hammer home the point.
paragraphs.cn: 《巫师3:往日之歌》(The Witcher 3: Songs of the Past)公布后,CDPR员工纷纷在社交媒体上强调,这应被视为「资料片」而非「DLC」——甚至搬出了IGN对《赛博朋克》主演伊德里斯·艾尔巴(Idris Elba)的采访来佐证这一点。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, CD Projekt announced the third expansion to its hugely successful fantasy role-playing game The Witcher 3. It's due out in 2027, 12 years after the 60 million-selling The Witcher 3 came out in 2015, and 11 years after the second expansion, Blood and Wine, came out in 2016. The Witcher 3's first expansion, Hearts of Stone, was released in October 2015.
paragraphs.cn: 昨日,CDPR宣布为其商业大作《巫师3》制作第三部资料片。该作将于2027年发售,距离2015年发售、销量突破6000万份的《巫师3》本体已过去12年,距离2016年发售的第二部资料片《血与酒》整整11年。第一部资料片《石之心》(Hearts of Stone)则发售于2015年10月。

paragraphs.en: We don't have much to go on, save an official description that confirms Songs of the Past will return players to the role of legendary monster slayer Geralt of Rivia for a brand new adventure on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X and S, and PC. That's left a void for discussion around the size and scope of Songs of the Past, but everything CD Projekt staff have said following the announcement suggests fans can expect something pretty big.
paragraphs.cn: 目前关于本作的信息不多,官方仅确认《往日之歌》将让玩家再次扮演传奇猎魔人「利维亚的杰洛特」展开全新冒险,登陆PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X/S和PC平台。这给了玩家充分的空间去揣测它的体量和规模——不过CDPR员工公布后的所有言论都暗示,玩家可以期待一个相当大的资料片。

paragraphs.en: "Let me remind you the definition of the Expansion," Paweł Sasko, Associate Game Director on Cyberpunk 2 and former developer on Cyberpunk 2077, its expansion Phantom Liberty, and The Witcher 3 itself, tweeted alongside a clip of Idris Elba, who played Solomon Reed in the 2023 expansion. In the clip, which is taken from an IGN interview, Elba stresses that CD Projekt releases DLC for free, but expansions are a different proposition.
paragraphs.cn: 「请允许我重申一下『资料片』的定义,」帕维尔·萨斯科(Paweł Sasko)在推特发文这样写道。萨斯科是《赛博朋克2》副导演,曾参与《赛博朋克2077》及其资料片《往日之影》(Phantom Liberty)以及《巫师3》本体的开发。他附上了IGN对2023年资料片中扮演所罗门·里德(Solomon Reed)的伊德里斯·艾尔巴的采访片段。视频中,艾尔巴强调,CDPR的DLC是免费的,但资料片完全是另一回事。

paragraphs.en: "Just to be clear, it's not DLC. It's an expansion. You know why? Because we do expansions — Big! Massive! Monster! We don't do DLCs, and when we do, we give them away."
paragraphs.cn: 「我把话说清楚——这不是DLC,是资料片。你知道为什么吗?因为我们做资料片——大!巨大!怪物级!我们不做DLC,要做也是免费送的。」

paragraphs.en: If Songs of the Past is an expansion, then, we are safe to assume it will be, as Elba puts it, "big, massive, monster." But other CD Projekt developers have also chimed in.
paragraphs.cn: 既然《往日之歌》是资料片,那么我们可以放心地假设它会像艾尔巴说的那样「大、巨大、怪物级」。其他CDPR开发者也纷纷出来表态。

paragraphs.en: "For us at CDPR, DLCs are small pieces of content we release for free — like the additional outfits for The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt," Marcin Łukaszewski, Community and Social Media Manager, tweeted in response to a fan question.
paragraphs.cn: 「对我们CDPR来说,DLC是我们免费发布的小型内容——比如《巫师3:狂猎》中追加的服装包。」社区与社交媒体经理马辛·乌卡谢夫斯基(Marcin Łukaszewski)在回复一位粉丝时这样写道。

paragraphs.en: "Expansions, on the other hand, are major pieces of content providing lots of hours of gameplay, including new story, characters, etc."
paragraphs.cn: 「而资料片则是体量较大的主要内容,提供数十小时的玩法,包含新剧情、新角色等等。」

paragraphs.en: So while Songs of the Past is technically DLC because it's content you download, it should be thought of differently. (One recent report pointed to the possibility of a 'Dune-style' location for the new expansion.) CD Projekt will host an official special anniversary stream for Blood and Wine today, May 28. Perhaps we'll find out more there.
paragraphs.cn: 所以,虽然从技术上说《往日之歌》算DLC——毕竟是要下载的内容——但它不该被同等看待。(近期有报道指出,新资料片可能会有一个「沙丘风格」的场景。)CDPR今日(5月28日)将举办《血与酒》纪念特别直播,届时或许能得到更多信息。

paragraphs.en: Every CD Projekt Red Game In Development

It's a hugely busy time for CD Projekt. The Witcher 4 production continues, although CD Projekt has cautioned fans not to expect its launch until 2027 at the earliest. The company plans an ambitious six-year roadmap in which it will also launch The Witcher 5 and The Witcher 6.
paragraphs.cn: 当下对CDPR来说是异常忙碌的时期。《巫师4》仍在开发中,但CDPR已提醒玩家最早也要等到2027年才会发售。公司还规划了一个雄心勃勃的六年路线图,其中将同时推出《巫师5》和《巫师6》。

paragraphs.en: While further DLC for The Witcher 3 is now confirmed to be in development, CD Projekt has ruled out more DLC for Cyberpunk, suggesting fans will indeed have to wait for Cyberpunk 2 to return to its much-loved dystopian universe. And the wait looks like it's going to be significant; Cyberpunk 2 is further behind The Witcher 4, and CD Projekt co-CEO Michał Nowakowski has suggested Cyberpunk 2 won't be out until at least 2030.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《巫师3》的新资料片已经在开发中,但CDPR已经排除了为《赛博朋克》制作更多DLC的可能性,这意味着玩家若想重返那个广受喜爱的反乌托邦世界,只能等《赛博朋克2》。而这个等待看起来会相当漫长——《赛博朋克2》比《巫师4》进度更靠后,CDPR联席CEO米哈乌·诺瓦科夫斯基(Michał Nowakowski)已表示《赛博朋克2》最早也要到2030年才发售。

opus_summary: CDPR员工集体在社交媒体强调《巫师3:往日之歌》是「资料片」而非「DLC」,搬出IGN对伊德里斯·艾尔巴的采访为证。CDPR定义资料片为数十小时主线内容,《巫师4》最早2027年发售,《赛博朋克2》要等到2030年。
